Deploying the widget service

This is a clipped web page fixture for the pre-archive secret gate. The credential below is the OBVIOUSLY FAKE documentation example key published by AWS; it must trip the blocking aws-access-key pattern.


export AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE
aws s3 sync ./build s3://widget-service-releases

Everything else in this page is harmless prose about build pipelines.
